app.daemon.start_error:
[Manboster Daemon] Failed to start daemon: {{ .Error }}
Please make sure the daemon is not already running.
app.daemon.start_success: [Manboster Daemon] Daemon started. You can chat with your Lobster after a moment!
app.daemon.stop_success: [Manboster Daemon] Daemon stopped. Thank you for playing with your Lobster!
app.daemon.status_running: [Manboster Daemon] Daemon is running. View logs at {{ .Name }}
app.daemon.status_not_running: [Manboster Daemon] Daemon is not running. Delete PID files in {{ .Name }} to reset, or run 'manboster reset'. Error: {{ .Error }}
app.daemon.status_error:
[Manboster Daemon] Failed to get daemon PID file: {{ .Error }}
The daemon may not be running.
app.daemon.no_config: [Manboster Daemon] No configuration file found. Please run the setup wizard first.
app.daemon.log_error: [Manboster Daemon] Failed to tail log file: {{ .Error }}
